song_name: Beautiful The Carole King Musical - One Fine Day
version_description: Based off of the Broadway Cast Recording (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BWHyRGfcTEA).
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
One fine day[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
You'll look at me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
And you will know our love was meant to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]        [ch]C#m[/ch]
One fine day[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
You're gonna want me for your girl[/tab]

[ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
The arms I long for[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B[/ch]
Will open wide[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
And you'll be proud to have me walking right by your side[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]       [ch]C#m[/ch]
One fine day[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
You're gonna want me for your girl[/tab]

[ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[Bridge]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
Though I know you're the kind of boy[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]        [ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]C#m[/ch]
Who only wants to run around[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]F#[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]F#[/ch]
I'll keep waiting, and, someday darling[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
You'll come to me when you want to settle down, Oh![/tab]

[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
One fine day[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
We'll meet once more[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                [ch]Bbm[/ch]
And then you'll want the love you threw away before[/tab]

One fine day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
